[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000101 2
1 1100010 3
2 0110000 2
3 0000001 1
4 0110110 4
5 0011000 2
6 1000000 1
7 0110100 3

01 10 1010000 2
12 21 0010000 1
23 32 0010100 2
34 43 0000000 a
45 54 0100000 1
56 65 0100100 2
67 76 0100101 3
70 07 1110010 4

02 20 0110010 3
13 31 0010001 2
24 42 0100010 2
35 53 0010100 2
46 64 0100000 1
57 75 0110100 3 match 7
60 06 0100000 1
71 17 1010001 3

03 30 0011000 2 match 5
14 41 1000000 1 match 6
25 52 0110100 3 match 7
36 63 0000101 2 match 0
47 74 1100010 3 match 1
50 05 0110000 2 match 2
61 16 0000001 1 match 3
72 27 0110110 4 match 4

04 40 1100010 3 match 1
15 51 0010000 1
26 62 0100100 2
37 73 0010101 3
